title: AN ACT MAKING THE BARRIO OF NEW SABONGA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAUG, PROVINCE OF DAVAO, AS A PART OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF COMPOSTELA OF THE SAME PROVINCE.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 2659 / 51 OG No. 7, 3388 (July, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1311, June 16, 1955 ]

AN ACT MAKING THE BARRIO OF NEW SABONGA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAUG, PROVINCE OF DAVAO, AS A PART OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF COMPOSTELA OF THE SAME PROVINCE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled;

SECTION 1. The barrio of New Sabonga in the Municipality of Saug, Province of Davao, is hereby declared as a part of the Municipality of Compostela of the same Province.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1955.
